rag.empty: Upload a PDF or text file to ask questions about it.
rag.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about your uploaded documents.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation.

chat.deleteConfirm: Delete this chat and its messages?
topbar.title: AI Gateway v1.0
topbar.subtitle: Multi-Model Response System
topbar.compareInfo: Your request is handled by three AI models in parallel; the judge ({model}) picks the best answer.
compare.title: All Model Responses
banner.fallbackUsed: Responses were evaluated by fallback script.
banner.reason.judgeUnavailable: The judge was unavailable (timeout, rate limit, or network).
banner.reason.invalidResponse: The judge returned an invalid response.
banner.reason.lowConfidence: The judge's confidence was below the threshold.
composer.autoRagNote: While you have documents, every answer is grounded in them automatically.
rag.acceptHint: Text documents only: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.persistWarn: Heads up: an uploaded file is stored on the server and used in your answers until you remove it. Deleting it (✕) is permanent and cannot be undone.
rag.err.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Allowed: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.err.noText: No readable text found in the document.
single.note: Single chat is not saved separately. You can't create a saved chat here; you can clear the history — messages disappear from the screen.
compare.threadEmpty: Ask your first question to start this chat.
chatList.currentEmpty: Can't create a new chat: the current one is still empty.
author.name: Stanislav Byndas
author.tagline: A real, production-grade app built solo — from the backend and AI orchestration to the UI.
limit.title: Limited account
limit.text: This account is limited to {perDay} requests per day because the app uses free API keys. Remaining today: {remaining}.
